---
title: "CV"
description: "Curriculum vitae."
---

[Download CV](assets/cv/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

### About

**Rahul Manavalan**  
MPhil student in mathematical statistics and scientific computing.

### Interests

Scientific computing, numerical analysis, inverse problems, and uncertainty quantification.

### Education

- MPhil/Licentiate, Mathematical Statistics, Lund University.
- MSc, Computational Science and Engineering, Technical University of Munich.
- B.E, Mechanical Engineering, Government College of Technology.

### Contact

- GitHub: <https://github.com/AllThingsDynamical>
- Email: `dynamicqueries@gmail.com`
